title: branding — model relationships
description: Branding is a single-entity module; the only relation is Tenant -> Branding (1:1 or 1:N depending on future multi-profile design; single row per Tenant at v0.3).

outbound.description: Applied via the BelongsToTenant trait. Unique(tenant_id) index at v0.3 (one profile per tenant); may relax if per-audience branding lands.

inbound_expected.via: brandable_type + brandable_id (planned: logo variants stored via storage)
